---
title: "The Right Rev. Cecil Wilson"
---

## The Right Rev. Cecil Wilson

**Dates:** 1860-1941

### Description

missionary

### Biography

He served as Bishop of Melanesia (1894-1911) in succession to the Rt. Rev. J. R. Selwyn, and then as Bishop of Bunbury, Australia, 1918-1937.

### Letters

- [To the Countess of Glasgow, Sept 25th 1898](../letters/3381_To_the_Countess_of_Glasgow.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
